Context:
Weekly reliability review: checkout p95 improved to 1.1s after cache tuning. Search errors caused 2% retries yesterday. Cloud spend is up 12% week over week from burst capacity.

key_points: Checkout p95 now 1.1s after cache tuning
Cloud spend up 12% WoW from burst capacity
gold.recommended_action: Stabilize search and trim burst capacity before the next peak

Context:

gold.recommended_action: Add preflight checks for flag defaults before rollout
